Postmark Bridge =============== Provides Postmark integration for Symfony Mailer. Configuration example: ```env # SMTP MAILER_DSN=postmark+smtp://ID@default # API MAILER_DSN=postmark+api://KEY@default ``` where: - `ID` is your Postmark Server Token - `KEY` is your Postmark Server Token Resources --------- * [Contributing](https://symfony.com/doc/current/contributing/index.html) * [Report issues](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/issues) and [send Pull Requests](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/pulls) in the [main Symfony repository](https://github.com/symfony/symfony)
